title: symphoricarpos orbiculatus
intro: Symphoricarpos orbiculatus, also known as Snowberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and red or white berries. The medicinal properties of Snowberry include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Snowberry include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Snowberry can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
